# Eric Li

> Product designer and developer. Co-founder of Versive.

Eric Li is a product designer and developer based in Brooklyn, NY. He is the co-founder of Versive, an AI-first user research platform. He previously worked at Uber, Bread (acquired by Alliance Data), and Vareto. He studied economics at the University of Chicago.

## Projects

- Versive (https://getversive.com): An AI-first user research platform that helps teams conduct and synthesize user research at scale.
- Scratch (https://ericli.io/scratch): An offline-first, open source markdown note-taking app for Mac, Windows, and Linux. No cloud, no account, no subscriptions.
- Whisker (https://github.com/getversive/whisker): An AI-powered usability testing CLI tool.

## Writing

Eric writes about product design, software development, AI tools, and building products. His articles are available at https://ericli.io/writing.

## Contact

- Website: https://ericli.io
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/erictli
- GitHub: https://github.com/erictli
- Email: eric@getversive.com
